name: I Lost my Eggs: Easter
short_description: Embark on a fun Easter egg hunt! Explore seven enchanting rooms, solve fun Easter trivia, and uncover hidden eggs in the most unexpected places. Can you find them all? The hunt is on!
detailed_description:
Easter is here, and someone hid all the eggs! Embark on an adorable adventure, exploring every corner of a charming church. Search through seven magical rooms, open doors, move objects, and uncover secrets while hunting for the lost eggs!

If you need a little help, answer cute Easter-themed questions — get them right and receive a special hint to continue your hunt. Can you find them all?

Features

  • Charming Egg Hunt: Look in unexpected places and discover hidden spots.

  • Fun Easter Trivia: Answer true or false questions to earn helpful hints.

  • Seven Rooms to Explore: Each environment holds colorful surprises and mysteries.

  • Family-Friendly Fun: Perfect for kids and adults to enjoy together!

The sweetest Easter adventure is waiting for you. Let’s go egg hunting!

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
